footer.v: 1 - Còn sử dụng, 0 - Không còn sử dụng

command.text: declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$updateConflict nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Trạng thái duyệt %s đã có hoặc lồng nhau trong danh mục khai báo trạng thái duyệt .' else N'The approval indicator %s is invalid or already exists.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Trạng thái duyệt %s đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The approval indicator %s has been modified or deleted by another user.' end select @$updateConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Trạng thái duyệt %s đã phát sinh, không thể sửa được.' else N'Cannot edit the approval indicator %s. It has already been used.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Trạng thái duyệt %s đã phát sinh, không thể xóa được.' else N'Cannot delete the approval indicator %s. It has already been used.' end

if exists(select 1 from @@table where loai_duyet = @loai_duyet and u_status = @u_status) begin select 'u_status' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@u_status)) as message return end select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID, @s_status = '9', @xtype = 'U'

if not exists(select 1 from @@table where loai_duyet = $loai_duyet.OldValue and u_status = $u_status.OldValue) begin select 'u_status' as field, replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s', rtrim($u_status.OldValue)) as message return end if @u_status <> $u_status.OldValue begin if exists(select 1 from @@table where loai_duyet = @loai_duyet and u_status = @u_status) begin select 'u_status' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@u_status)) as message return end
if exists(select 1 from dmquyen a join dmquyenct b on a.ma_quyen = b.ma_quyen where (b.status = $u_status.OldValue or b.status2 = $u_status.OldValue or b.status0 = $u_status.OldValue) and a.loai_duyet = @loai_duyet) begin select 'u_status' as field, replace(@$updateConflict, '%s', rtrim($u_status.OldValue)) as message return end end
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where loai_duyet = @loai_duyet and u_status = @u_status

if exists(select 1 from @@table where loai_duyet = @loai_duyet and u_status = @u_status and xtype = 'S') begin select '' as script, '$NotAuthorized' as message return end
if exists(select 1 from dmquyen a join dmquyenct b on a.ma_quyen = b.ma_quyen where (b.status = @u_status or b.status2 = @u_status or b.status0 = @u_status) and a.loai_duyet = @loai_duyet) begin select replace(@$deleteConflict, '%s', rtrim(@u_status)) as message return end
